title: ilex socorroensis
intro: Ilex socorroensis, also known as Socorro holly, is a shrub or small tree species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ilex socorroensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering the risk of certain cancers. Ilex socorroensis leaves can be made into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
